item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: I really like how emotional but still robotic Fiver's dialogue feels. +1

item.title: aw, fuck.
item.content:encoded:
I've got to admit that this brought me close to tears.

+1

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded: While it's obvious you did your best with some lackluster containment procedures, I still have some issues with the description and addenda; at a certain point Fiver's character becomes less tragic and more grating, and the ending addendum is a bit too… cinematic, I guess? While the reveal makes a good resolution for Fiver's character, the way it's presented is odd. Not sure if it's just the brevity of the addendum as a whole or the nonclinical line about the children, though.

item.title: Re: Author Post - RESERVED
item.content:encoded: 🗿😢Hurt feeling, I am a mouse bastard

item.title: Author Post - RESERVED
item.content:encoded: hi i took my ADHD meds in the evening instead of the morning and that was a grave mistake. this will be edited later when it is not 2am and i can properly use wikidot syntax. thank you to idea critters minathewitch, DrFullham, and soulless and draft critters drfullham (again) sonderance, and malyce. i can die peacefully now. night night, rat bastards.
